title: Did the boy go where he wanted to?

meanings.usage: 作为动词表示逃学的行为
形容人缺乏创意或想象力
通过免费搭乘过路车辆旅行
用于描述同时发生的两件事
指无声无息地移动，通常为不引起注意
指两个国家或地区之间的分界线
感到尴尬或失去尊严的感觉
put to shame为固定搭配，意为使相形见绌
指让人上车或拾起某物

phrases.usage: 指学生逃学、旷课的行为

examples.en: Children who play truant from school are unimaginative.
examples.zh: 逃学的孩子都缺乏想象力。

examples.en: He was caught when playing truant.

phrases.usage: 使...相形见绌，使...自愧不如

examples.en: They have all been put to shame by this boy.
examples.zh: 他们都被这个男孩比得黯然失色。

examples.en: He fell asleep and the boat travelled to Calais in the meantime.
examples.zh: 他睡着了，船在这期间航行到了加来。

examples.en: The driver left him just outside the city.
examples.zh: 司机把他留在城外不远处。

examples.en: There he was picked up by a policeman.
examples.zh: 在那里他被警察带走了。

examples.en: He has surely set up a record for truant children.
examples.zh: 他无疑为逃学的孩子们创下了一项纪录。

examples.en: Children who dream of evading school.

phrases.usage: 他们最多也就...，他们的极限是...

examples.en: Eight hours in a cinema is usually as far as they get.
examples.zh: 在电影院待八个小时通常是他们能做到的极限。

examples.en: Seeing the same film over and over again.
examples.zh: 一遍又一遍地看同一部电影。

examples.en: The boat had travelled to Calais in the meantime.
examples.zh: 与此同时，船已经航行到了加来。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，强调'过去的过去'
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述发生在另一个过去动作之前的动作，常与when, after, before, by等连用

examples.en: He discovered that the boat had travelled to Calais.
examples.zh: 他发现船已经航行到加来了。

examples.en: The driver gave him biscuits that he had never seen before.
examples.zh: 司机给了他一些他从未见过的饼干。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去某个时刻正在发生的事情，或表示背景动作

examples.en: While playing truant, he travelled 1,600 miles.
examples.zh: 在逃学期间，他旅行了1600英里。

examples.en: He was sleeping when the boat arrived in Calais.
examples.zh: 船到达加来时他正在睡觉。

grammar.title: 被动语态 (Passive Voice)
grammar.definition: 强调动作的承受者而非执行者，句子结构为be + 过去分词
grammar.structure: 主语 + be动词 + 过去分词 (+ by + 动作执行者)
grammar.usage: 当不知道动作执行者或强调动作承受者时使用

examples.en: He was picked up by a policeman.
He was sent back to England by the local authorities.
examples.zh: 他被当地当局送回了英国。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing + 时间段

original.en: They have all been put to shame by a boy who, while playing truant, travelled 1,600 miles.
original.zh: 他们都为一个逃学旅行了1600英里的男孩感到羞耻。

imitations.en: She has been working here for five years.
imitations.zh: 她已经在这里工作五年了。

imitations.en: He has been learning English since 2020.
imitations.zh: 他自2020年以来一直在学英语。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When/While + 主语 + 过去式， 主语 + 过去完成时

original.en: When he woke up next morning, he discovered that the boat had travelled to Calais.
original.zh: 当他第二天早上醒来时，他发现船已经航行到加来了。

imitations.en: When she arrived, I had finished my homework.
imitations.zh: 当她到达时，我已经完成了作业。

imitations.en: While he was sleeping, the thief had taken his wallet.
imitations.zh: 当他睡觉时，小偷偷走了他的钱包。

sentencePatterns.pattern: There + be + 主语 + 过去分词短语

original.en: There he was picked up by a policeman and sent back to England.
original.zh: 在那里他被警察带走并送回了英国。

imitations.en: There he was caught by his teacher.
imitations.zh: 在那里他被老师抓住了。

imitations.en: There she was welcomed by her friends.
imitations.zh: 在那里她受到了朋友们的欢迎。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be + 形容词 + 不定式

original.en: Children who play truant from school are unimaginative.
original.zh: 逃学的孩子都缺乏想象力。

imitations.en: It is important to learn English.
He is lucky to get such a good job.
imitations.zh: 他能得到这么好的工作真是幸运。
